series_metadata.series_description: Minutes generated from official meetings that document the business conducted during the meeting relating to orders, policy/procedures, directives, discussion, decisions and actions. (Examples: Commission Meetings and other committee, board, group or council meetings.)

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for two (2) state fiscal years following the fiscal year created. Destroy when no longer of administrative value and after State Archives completes historic review. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records. ; Electronic: Retain for two (2) state fiscal years following the fiscal year created. Destroy when no longer of administrative value and after State Archives completes historic review. An RC-3 is required when destroying these records., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
